issues_found: Source is a homepage (nyse.com) - violates core rule 5 which requires rejection of homepages, navigation, listing, or search pages
Source content is predominantly promotional/marketing material about NYSE listings and services
Substantive market commentary is extremely thin - a brief ~250 word weekly recap embedded in a marketing homepage
Limited market structure relevance - only basic technical observations (RSI, support levels) with no analysis of liquidity, order flow, or market microstructure
Source has minimal archival research value given the thin content and homepage classification
human_review_reason: Source is a homepage with primarily promotional content. Only a brief weekly market recap section contains substantive information. The generated record correctly identifies these issues but the source fundamentally does not meet archival quality standards. While the market commentary content is accurate to the source, the container page disqualifies it per verification rules.
